zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Rumigny於1263年6月出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼時，她的父親Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny28歲，母親Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden16歲。她和Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1325年12月7日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Rumigny于1263年6月出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯盧馬尼时，她的父亲Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny28岁，母亲Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden16岁。她和Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1325年12月7日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Rumigny was born in June 1263, in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny, was 28 and her mother, Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, was 16. She had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. She died after 7 December 1325.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Rumigny est née en juin 1263, à Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, avait 16 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. Elle est décédée après 7 décembre 1325.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Rumigny im Juni 1263 in Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny 28 und ihre Mutter Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden 16. Sie hatte mit Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 7. Dezember 1325.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Rumigny è nata il nel giugno 1263 nel Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, aveva 16 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. Morì dopo il 7 dicembre 1325.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Rumignyが1263年6月にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスルミグニーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumignyは28歳，母Philippine van Beveren Dixmuidenは16歳であった。彼女はTheobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraineとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1325年12月7日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Rumigny(이)가 1263년 6월 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 럼익니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1325년 12월 7일 이후 사망했다.

mn.Jun 1263–AFT 7 Dec 1325: 1263 оны Зургаадугаар сар–1325 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 7–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Rumigny nasceu em junho de 1263, em Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, tinha 16 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. Ela faleceu após 7 de dezembro de 1325.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Rumigny родилась июнь 1263 г. в местности румигни, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, 16. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. Она умерла после 7 декабрь 1325 г.

es.Jun 1263–AFT 7 Dec 1325: junio de 1263–después de 7 de diciembre de 1325
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Rumigny nació en junio de 1263, en Rumigny, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Rumigny - Lord of Rumigny, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Philippine van Beveren Dixmuiden, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine. Murió después de 7 de diciembre de 1325.
